jsonld.name: Aesthetic Confidence Inversion
jsonld.description: Counterintuitive certainty in aesthetic judgments despite experiential absence, where lacking direct access to beauty makes evaluation more rather than less confident because it relies on reliable structural indicators instead of subjective aesthetic experience.
